scripts.dev:local: npm run build && wrangler dev --config wrangler.example.toml --local --ip 127.0.0.1 --port 8787
scripts.dev:local:fresh: npm run d1:apply && npm run d1:seed:local-admin && npm run dev:local
scripts.check: npm run biome:ci && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy:dry-run: npm run build && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.example.toml --dry-run
scripts.d1:seed:local-admin: node scripts/bootstrap-local-admin.mjs && wrangler d1 execute DB --config wrangler.example.toml --local --file ./.tmp/edgechat-local-admin-upsert.sql
